http:request.doc:name: POST /oauth/v1/tokens
http:request.doc:description: Request a fresh OAuth token from Opera

os:store.doc:name: Cache access token (cross-flow)
os:store.doc:description: Save the token for reuse across events

os:store.doc:name: Cache token expiry
os:store.doc:description: Save when the token will expire

logger.doc:name: Log token obtained (redacted)
logger.doc:description: Confirm a token was issued, without exposing it
logger.message: OHIP OAuth token obtained (expires_in=#[payload.expires_in]s); token value redacted

set-variable.doc:name: Load x-app-key (secure)
set-variable.doc:description: Load the x-app-key credential for the REST calls

os:retrieve.doc:name: Load cached token expiry
os:retrieve.doc:description: Read when the cached token expires

choice.doc:name: Refresh token if expired/expiring
choice.doc:description: Fetch a new token only when needed

when.doc:description: Cached token is missing or expires within 60s, so fetch a fresh one

try.doc:name: Orchestrate (fetch current state, upsert; DLQ on failure)
try.doc:description: Re-fetch current resource state and upsert it

try.doc:name: Fetch current resource state (404 = deleted)
try.doc:description: GET the latest resource; treat 404 as a delete

choice.doc:name: Route by moduleName
choice.doc:description: Pick the OHIP REST resource for this event

when.doc:description: Profile event, so GET the current profile state from OHIP
Reservation event with no hotelId, so fail it to the DLQ (hotelId is required in the path)

raise-error.description: #['RESERVATION event ' ++ (vars.businessEvent.metadata.uniqueEventId default '(no id)') ++ ' has no hotelId; getReservation requires it in the path.']
raise-error.doc:name: Reservation missing hotelId -> DLQ

when.doc:description: Reservation event, so GET the current reservation state from OHIP

logger.doc:name: [PLUG-IN] Upsert current resource
logger.doc:description: Stand-in for your idempotent backend upsert
logger.message: [UPSERT] Replace with backend write: eventName=#[vars.businessEvent.eventName] module=#[vars.businessEvent.moduleName] primaryKey=#[vars.businessEvent.primaryKey] uniqueEventId=#[vars.businessEvent.metadata.uniqueEventId]

on-error-continue.doc:name: 404 -> delete
on-error-continue.doc:description: Treat a missing resource as a delete

logger.doc:name: [PLUG-IN] Delete resource
logger.message: [DELETE] Resource gone (404) - replace with backend delete: module=#[vars.businessEvent.moduleName] primaryKey=#[vars.businessEvent.primaryKey]

on-error-propagate.doc:name: OHIP down -> nack + propagate (feeds circuit breaker)
on-error-propagate.doc:description: Return the event and let the breaker count the outage

logger.doc:name: Log OHIP outage
logger.message: OHIP re-fetch failed (outage - nack + propagate, feeds circuit breaker): #[error.errorType.namespace]:#[error.errorType.identifier] - #[error.description]

anypoint-mq:nack.doc:name: Nack (return to queue)
anypoint-mq:nack.doc:description: Return the event to the queue for redelivery

on-error-continue.doc:name: Nack on failure (poison -> DLQ after redelivery)
on-error-continue.doc:description: Return the event to the queue for redelivery

anypoint-mq:nack.doc:description: Return the event to the queue for redelivery
